title: Childcare Teachers (Learning Kidz Tampines (mins to MRT)
description:
Placement for Tampines HUB, Tampines Plaza, Tampines Point and Income at Tampines Junction (All Near Mrt)

Childcare Educator (English)

Salary: $3,200 – $4,300 per month

About Us

At Learning Kidz, we believe every child deserves a caring and stimulating environment to grow and learn with joy. Our bilingual and thematic curriculum helps children build confidence, curiosity, and good character in their early years. We’re looking for dedicated educators who share our passion for nurturing young minds and creating meaningful learning experiences every day.

Responsibilities

Teaching and Learning

  • Plan and deliver engaging lessons that follow the centre’s curriculum framework.
  • Observe and record children’s learning progress to support their individual development.
  • Create hands-on, play-based activities that make learning enjoyable and relevant.

Care and Classroom Management

  • Maintain a safe, clean, and positive environment where children feel secure and supported.
  • Guide children gently in routines, social skills, and self-help habits.
  • Set up displays and resources that encourage curiosity and pride in learning.

Teamwork and Parent Partnership

  • Communicate regularly with parents to build trust and involve them in their child’s learning.
  • Work closely with fellow educators to plan lessons, events, and school celebrations.
  • Uphold the centre’s values of respect, care, and teamwork in all interactions.

What We Offer

  • Performance and Retention bonuses
  • Monthly Incentive payoout and other incentives
  • Group medical and hospitalisation insurance
  • Ongoing training and support for career development
  • Opportunities to progress into senior and leadership roles being exposed to mentoring, lead teachers and other opportunities like leading a team for special projects
  • A friendly, collaborative team that values both professional and personal growth

Requirements

  • ECDA-certified (ACEY, L1 or L2)
  • Diploma in Early Childhood Care and Education (Teaching) or equivalent
  • At least 1 year of teaching experience preferred
  • Good communication and classroom management skills
  • Warm, responsible, and enjoys working with young children
  • Able to work independently and in a team
  • Basic computer literacy is an advantage

Join Our Team

If you have a genuine love for children and believe in lifelong learning, we’d love to hear from you. Please send your resume to hr@learningkidz.com.sg or whatsapp Cecilia @90690910

PLEASE STATE YOUR EXPECTED SALARY

postedCompany.description: Learning Kidz was first established in May 2002 with a mission to develop each child to their full potential by providing equal opportunities and quality care in a safe, conducive and caring enviroment. At Learning Kidz, we cultivate and promote Kindness and Integrity in everything we do. We are fully committed to nurturing our children and preparing them for the challenges of formal education. Currently, we operate 6 childcare centres and 2 enrichment branches across Singapore with a drive to bring smiles across our little ones' faces everyday.  We have 2 infant care services at Ang Mo kio (Mrt) and Tampines (Mrt). We are also under POP and Spark.
postedCompany.name: LEARNING KIDZ ACADEMY PTE. LTD.
